title: brachypodium sylvaticum var. dumosum
intro: Brachypodium sylvaticum var. dumosum, also known as bent or broom grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Brachypodium sylvaticum var. dumosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
